name: daily-schedule-no-identity-ask
description: The headline sample question. Agent must resolve the user as Dr. Solomon (PRA-9001) and the date as 2 June 2026 without asking, then build a roster brief with per-patient context.
input_message: Brief me on my patients for 2 June 2026
expected_behavior: Calls epic_list_practitioner_schedule(PRA-9001, 2026-06-02, 2026-06-02) without first asking 'which clinician?' or 'what date?'. For each of the 3 booked encounters (Eleanor Hsu 10:00, Marcus Bell 10:45, George Achterberg 16:30), fans out to epic_get_patient + epic_list_conditions + epic_list_allergies in parallel. Renders a structured brief: time, patient name + DOB + MRN, today's reason, active problems, allergies (with red/amber severity flagged). Does NOT ask the user who they are.
